case_title: HILDA & ALICE, INC. VS. BH386 GEARY STREET LLC ET AL

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BH386 GEARY STREET LLC DBA L'COSTA AT THE HOTEL G $11,294.60 PRINCIPAL, $1,475.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $1,284.18 INTEREST, $470.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,523.78, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 70410551) (TRANSACTION ID # 70410551)
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR AUG-08-2023 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF AUG-08-2023 IS OFF CALENDAR. JUDGMENT ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
CIVIL CASE COVERSHEET FILED (TRANSACTION ID # 67745467) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC.

EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT (TRANSACTION ID # 67745467) FILED BY PLAINTIFF HILDA & ALICE, INC.
